_comment: The five locally runnable systems selected for evaluation. All bibliographic fields are taken from the verified records in metadata/papers.json -- nothing is fabricated. 'doi': null means no DOI is published, not that one was not looked for. Grounded SAM 2 has no standalone paper; SAM 2 is used as its primary academic reference and this is stated explicitly rather than papered over.

systems.primary_paper: Grounding DINO: Marrying DINO with Grounded Pre-Training for Open-Set Object Detection
systems.authors: Shilong Liu, Zhaoyang Zeng, Tianhe Ren, Feng Li, Hao Zhang, Jie Yang, Qing Jiang, Chunyuan Li, Jianwei Yang, Hang Su, Jun Zhu, Lei Zhang
systems.notes: Original open-vocabulary detector. Swin-T (662 MB) and Swin-B (895 MB) weights are public GitHub release assets. No official ONNX/TensorRT export exists in the repo. Local source pinned at 856dde2. Supporting papers: DINO, BERT, Swin Transformer (in papers/core_foundations/, not duplicated here).

systems.primary_paper: An Open and Comprehensive Pipeline for Unified Object Grounding and Detection
systems.authors: Xiangyu Zhao, Yicheng Chen, Shilin Xu, Xiangtai Li, Xinjiang Wang, Yining Li, Haian Huang
systems.notes: NOT a standalone repository -- it lives inside MMDetection at configs/mm_grounding_dino/ (model: mmdet/models/detectors/grounding_dino.py; checkpoint URLs: configs/mm_grounding_dino/metafile.yml). The only one of the five with a first-party deployment path (MMDeploy, which ships a TensorRT plugin for MultiScaleDeformableAttention). Swin-T/B/L weights local. No prebuilt mmcv wheel exists for Jetson/aarch64. No DOI published. Local source pinned at cfd5d3a (mmdet v3.3.0).

systems.primary_paper: Grounded SAM: Assembling Open-World Models for Diverse Visual Tasks
systems.authors: Tianhe Ren, Shilong Liu, Ailing Zeng, Jing Lin, Kunchang Li, He Cao, Jiayu Chen, Xinyu Huang, Yukang Chen, Feng Yan, Zhaoyang Zeng, Hao Zhang, Feng Li, Jie Yang, Hongyang Li, Qing Jiang, Lei Zhang
systems.planned_role: Measure whether precise masks improve target localization
systems.notes: A PIPELINE, not a new base detector: Grounding DINO produces boxes, SAM produces masks. Has NO weights of its own -- reuses checkpoints/grounding_dino/ and checkpoints/sam/ (ViT-H 2.4 GB, ViT-B 358 MB). Academic foundations: Grounding DINO + Segment Anything (Kirillov et al. 2023, arXiv 2304.02643, in papers/core_foundations/). No video tracking. No DOI published. Local source pinned at 126abe6.

systems.primary_paper: SAM 2: Segment Anything in Images and Videos
systems.authors: Nikhila Ravi, Valentin Gabeur, Yuan-Ting Hu, Ronghang Hu, Chaitanya Ryali, Tengyu Ma, Haitham Khedr, Roman Radle, Chloe Rolland, Laura Gustafson, Eric Mintun, Junting Pan, Kalyan Vasudev Alwala, Nicolas Carion, Chao-Yuan Wu, Ross Girshick, Piotr Dollar, Christoph Feichtenhofer
systems.planned_role: Full acquisition-plus-tracking baseline; closest system-level reference pipeline
systems.notes: NO STANDALONE PAPER EXISTS -- Grounded SAM 2 is a software integration; the SAM 2 paper is used as its primary academic reference. See production/papers/04_grounded_sam_2/NO_STANDALONE_PAPER.md. api_required=false applies to the LOCAL path (Grounding DINO 1.0 + SAM 2, both with local weights). The repo ALSO ships API-backed demos for Grounding DINO 1.5, 1.6 and DINO-X, which have NO public local checkpoints, run on the DeepDataSpace cloud, and require an API_TOKEN -- those are out of scope and cannot ship on Jetson. SAM 2.1 weights local: hiera tiny/small/base_plus/large (149 MB - 857 MB). Local source pinned at b7a9c29.

systems.primary_paper: PET-DINO: Unifying Visual Cues into Grounding DINO with Prompt-Enriched Training
systems.authors: Weifu Fu, Jinyang Li, Bin-Bin Gao, Jialin Li, Yuhuan Lin, Hanqiu Deng, Wenbing Tao, Yong Liu, Chengjie Wang
systems.planned_role: Newer prompt-enriched detector comparison; only system supporting visual prompts
systems.notes: Standalone Grounding-DINO-derived detector (an MMDetection fork). The ONLY one of the five supporting visual prompts (AFVPG), in addition to text. Project page: https://fuweifuvtoo.github.io/pet-dino/. Authorship verified via arXiv -> project page -> GitHub -> author HF org 'fuweifu' (corresponding author Weifu Fu, Tencent YouTu). Weights verified public and ungated: pet_dino_swin-t_8xb4_12e_obj365.pth (2.2 GB) is the ONLY published checkpoint -- the in-repo Swin-L config has no released weight. Requires MM-GDINO Swin-T as initialisation (shared, not duplicated). No DOI published. Local source pinned at 7830a46.

supporting_papers._comment: Referenced, not duplicated into production/. These live canonically in papers/core_foundations/ and are shared across systems.

papers.title: DINO: DETR with Improved DeNoising Anchor Boxes for End-to-End Object Detection
papers.authors: Hao Zhang, Feng Li, Shilong Liu, Lei Zhang, Hang Su, Jun Zhu, Lionel M. Ni, Heung-Yeung Shum

papers.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
papers.authors: Jacob Devlin, Ming-Wei Chang, Kenton Lee, Kristina Toutanova

papers.title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows
papers.authors: Ze Liu, Yutong Lin, Yue Cao, Han Hu, Yixuan Wei, Zheng Zhang, Stephen Lin, Baining Guo

papers.title: Segment Anything
papers.authors: Alexander Kirillov, Eric Mintun, Nikhila Ravi, Hanzi Mao, Chloe Rolland, Laura Gustafson, Tete Xiao, Spencer Whitehead, Alexander C. Berg, Wan-Yen Lo, Piotr Dollar, Ross Girshick
